---
title: "Reinforcement Learning"
short-title: "RL"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "MDPs, value iteration, policy iteration, and the Sutton & Barto framework."
keywords: ["reinforcement learning", "MDP", "value iteration", "policy iteration"]
---

# Reinforcement Learning {#sec-reinforcement-learning}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
